title: Using De-MetaST-BLAST for Primer Validation
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ii2ccge

steps.title: Use MEGA to perform an alignment...
steps.instruction: Use MEGA to perform an alignment of the gene of interest

steps.title: The predicted amplicon (70-200bp for RT-qPCR)...
steps.instruction: The predicted amplicon (70-200bp for RT-qPCR) must have enough variability that sequencing these amplicons can distinguish taxonomy

steps.title: Check for G4 complexes and other...
steps.instruction: Check for G4 complexes and other secondary structures that the primers may form

steps.title: Check for non-specific amplification and thermal stability for PCR protocols
steps.instruction: Check for non-specific amplification and thermal stability for PCR protocols

steps.title: $ cd~/Desktop/Sam/De-MetaST-BLAST/ (or cd to wherever the program is)
steps.instruction: $ cd~/Desktop/Sam/De-MetaST-BLAST/ (or cd to wherever the program is)

steps.title: Input filename for primers (press Enter to use Primers
steps.instruction: Input filename for primers (press Enter to use Primers.txt) (Custom file.txt or hit enter)

steps.title: <Press Enter> Opening
steps.instruction: <Press Enter> Opening: Primers.txt Forward Primer: CARGGNGAYACNCARCC Reverse Primer: YTTNCCRTCNCKRYCNGT
